metadata.summary_en: Los Thuthanaka basically came out of nowhere last year to capture Pitchfork's album of the year with their self-titled debut. Because it wasn't available on streaming, it largely flew under the radar. I honestly kind of forgot about it until Pitchfork gave it the number one spot in its year-end list. In retrospect, I'm not […]

briefs.title: Suno 是音乐版权的噩梦

metadata.summary_en: AI music platform Suno's policy is that it does not permit the use of copyrighted material. You can upload your own tracks to remix or set your original lyrics to AI-generated music. But, it's supposed to recognize and stop you from using other people's songs and lyrics. Now, no system is perfect, but it turns […]

briefs.summary_zh: AI音乐平台Suno的政策是不允许使用受版权保护的材料。您可以上传自己的曲目进行混音，或将原始歌词。

While it's been a constant, sometimes unwelcome presence in Gmail for at least the past year, it's a relatively new addition to Maps. And you know what? It's kind of great. To […]

briefs.summary_zh: 您可能对 Gemini 很熟悉，因为您使用的每项 Google 服务中都包含 Gemini - 无。

secondary.title: 根据微软的使用条款，Copilot“仅用于娱乐目的”

metadata.summary_en: AI skeptics aren’t the only ones warning users not to unthinkingly trust models’ outputs — that’s what the AI companies say themselves in their terms of service.

main.title: 兰维尔·辛格执导的《杜兰达尔：复仇》全球票房突破 1.74 亿美元，成为第一部北美票房突破 2500 万美元的印度电影

metadata.summary_en: Jio Studios and B62 Studios’ “Dhurandhar: The Revenge” has crossed INR1,622 crores ($174.4 million) worldwide through its third weekend, becoming the first Indian film to surpass $25 million in North America and €1 million ($1.1 million) in Germany. The Aditya Dhar-directed spy-action sequel’s India gross stands at $132.1 million. In Germany, the film established itself […]

main.summary_zh: Jio Studios 和 B62 Studios 的《杜兰达尔：复仇》截至第三周末，全球票房已突破 162.2 亿印度卢比（1.744 亿美元），成为第一部在北美票房超过 2500 万美元、在德国票房超过 100 万欧元（110 万美元）的印度电影。这部由阿迪亚·达尔 (Aditya Dhar) 执导的间谍动作续集在印度的票房达到 1.321 亿美元。在德国，这部电影确立了自己的地位 […]

briefs.title: 《死亡面孔》评论：一部 70 年代风格的 B 级恐怖电影迎合了人们对“真实”恐怖片日益增长的胃口

metadata.summary_en: The idea that a sicko like Arthur isn’t just a serial killer — he’s part of the new anything-goes attention economy! — is a provocative but facile idea. Yet that’s part of what gives "Faces of Death" the texture of a '70s grindhouse movie. They often had ideas too. "Faces of Death" is "ambitious" trash, with the courage of its own gaudy thematic grandiloquence.

briefs.summary_zh: 像亚瑟这样的疯子不仅仅是一个连环杀手，他还是新的随心所欲的注意力经济的一部分！ ——这是一个具有挑。
